title: Yorkshire Beef Pudding
description: A traditional British dish consisting of a savory beef pudding made from a mixture of ground beef, eggs, and breadcrumbs, typically served as a main course.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine ground beef, breadcrumbs, eggs, flour, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Gradually add warm beef stock to the mixture, stirring until just combined. Be careful not to overmix.
Heat butter in a 9x13-inch baking dish in the oven until melted.
Pour the beef pudding mixture into the hot baking dish.
Return the dish to the oven and cook for 25-30 minutes, or until the pudding is golden brown and set.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5-10 minutes before serving.
